title: Cuneiform Tablet #0569: Old Assyrian Divinatory
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a divinatory document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Divinatory document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records divinatory matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
